name: ahorrapy-scraper
description: Automated web scraper for AhorraPY supermarket prices

scripts.scrape:superseis: tsx -e "import { SuperseisScraper } from './scrapers/superseis-scraper'; const s = new SuperseisScraper(); s.init().then(() => s.scrapeProducts()).then(p => { console.log(p.length + ' products'); s.close(); })"
scripts.scrape:stock: tsx -e "import { StockScraper } from './scrapers/stock-scraper'; const s = new StockScraper(); s.init().then(() => s.scrapeProducts()).then(p => { console.log(p.length + ' products'); s.close(); })"
scripts.scrape:casa-rica: tsx -e "import { CasaRicaScraper } from './scrapers/casa-rica-scraper'; const s = new CasaRicaScraper(); s.init().then(() => s.scrapeProducts()).then(p => { console.log(p.length + ' products'); s.close(); })"
scripts.scrape:biggie: tsx -e "import { BiggieScraper } from './scrapers/biggie-scraper'; const s = new BiggieScraper(); s.init().then(() => s.scrapeProducts()).then(p => { console.log(p.length + ' products'); s.close(); })"
